mode: new background threads, one independent emblem image per faction
historical_image_policy: No v03/v04 faction flag sheet was used as an image source or redraw base. Current references use stable unversioned PNG paths; superseded images are archived under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/history/ with _vNN filenames.

results.thread_title: 断航故土 昭明帝国徽章 v01
results.notes: Initial v01 direction preserved: vermilion imperial sun disk, antique gold rim and rays, moon-white crescent, standalone emblem composition. Superseded by v02 and archived.

results.thread_title: 断航故土 肃明国清明院徽章 v01
results.notes: Outer insect motif is reduced and subordinate; black seepage visibly contaminates the white black-sun halo.

results.thread_title: 断航故土 北境万兽徽章 v01
results.notes: Initial v01 Wanshou alliance mark reads as many beast clans united through antlers, horns, claw plates, tusks, feather forms, bone beads, and a central northern spirit flame. Superseded by v02 and archived.

commit_status: not staged or committed; user requested asset creation only
